title: Block Components Range And Steps
description: Defines a value range with discrete steps.

range.title: Range
range.description:
The range of the random offset.

Properties:
• max (float) = 0
• min (float) = 0
range.x-runtime-constraint-description: Check that the limits imposed on the range (minimum, maximum and maximum distance between values) are respected

steps.title: Steps
steps.description: The number of steps between the range. Specify 0 for all possible values between the range.
